findings.description: Section s2 covers the entire 作成手順 h2 block, which contains four h3 subsections (ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成, Actionのメソッド名命名方法, Actionの作成, View(JSP)の作成). The combined plain-text content of these subsections is well over 2000 characters and the source has multiple h3 headings inside this h2. Per V3 rules, this should be split into separate sections rather than merged into a single section.
findings.source_evidence: Source h3 headings inside 作成手順: ビジネスロジック(Component)の作成 / Actionのメソッド名命名方法 / Actionの作成 / View(JSP)の作成 — all large subsections each containing code examples and explanations.
